title: Maharashtra bypolls: 8% turnout in Baramati, 6% in Rahuri till 9 a.m.
description: The Rahuri seat became vacant after BJP MLA Shivaji Kardile’s death in October last year. His son Akshay Kardile is in the fray in Rahuri, pitted against NCP (SP) candidate Govind Mokate and Vanchit Bahujan Aghadi’s Santosh Chalke.
